# NZDA Otago Branch

> The Otago Branch of the New Zealand Deerstalkers Association (NZDA). Recreational hunting club serving the Otago region of New Zealand, with a member rifle range in Dunedin, a backcountry lodge near Beaumont, organised club hunts, and the HUNTS hunter education course.

The branch is part of the wider NZDA, New Zealand's largest national hunting organisation. Membership is managed nationally through deerstalkers.org.nz; this site covers Otago-specific facilities, events, and contacts.

## Key pages

- [Home](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/): overview of the branch.
- [Chaz Forsyth Rifle Range](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/range): outdoor rifle range on Leith Valley Road, Dunedin. 25, 50, 100 metre distances. Open most Saturdays 1pm to 4pm. Members $5 per visit, non-members $10. Live weekly timetable.
- [Blue Mountains Lodge](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/lodge): backcountry lodge at 65 Rongahere Road, Beaumont. About 1h20 south of Dunedin via SH1. 16-bed bunkhouse, six private huts, meat storage, dog kennels. Otago Branch members $10 per night.
- [Club Hunts](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/club-hunts): organised hunts through the year for deer, goat, tahr, and wallaby.
- [HUNTS Course](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/hunts-course): nationally recognised hunter education programme. Local coordinator Frans Laas, 027 230 7157.
- [Competitions](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/competitions): annual trophy, photography, and video competitions.
- [Join](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/join): membership benefits, including 50+ retailer partner discounts via the NZDA app. Signup via NZDA national.
- [Newsletter](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/newsletters): monthly committee updates, hunt reports, range news.
- [Contact](https://otagodeerstalkers.co.nz/contact): committee contact and meeting details.

## Key facts

- Clubrooms: 53 Malvern Street, Woodhaugh, Dunedin 9010.
- Monthly meetings: second Monday of each month, 7:30pm. No meeting in January or April.
- Visitors welcome at meetings.
- Membership benefits include access to the rifle range and lodge at member rates, club hunt entry, the NZ Hunting & Wildlife magazine quarterly, public liability insurance, and the NZDA app with 50+ partner discounts.
- The branch is one local chapter of the wider New Zealand Deerstalkers Association (https://www.deerstalkers.org.nz).
